name: Content Agent
description: Slack bot that drafts blog posts, LinkedIn posts, release notes, and newsletters in your house voice from Notion.

name: Personal Agent
description: Durable personal AI assistant with long-term memory. Web chat, Slack, Linear, and user-approved memory saves.

name: GitHub PR Triage
description: Triages pull requests on open: reads the diff, applies labels, and posts a structured triage comment.

name: Eve Chat
description: Persisted Next.js chat UI for Eve with Better Auth, Neon history, Streamdown markdown, and Vercel Connect integrations.

name: Slack Starter
description: Starter Slack bot on Eve with one example tool and one skill. Deploy, @mention it, and start building.
